system.notes: Feeds sensors false data about a target's range, position, and heading — subtler than ECM (a sensor isn't aware it's deceived). Cost & weight by Level: L1 50,000¥/35 kg/SI 3, L2 190,000¥/45/SI 3.5, L3 400,000¥/60/SI 4, L4 1M¥/60/SI 4.5, L5 4M¥/60/SI 5, L6 8M¥/110; Avail 8/30 days (L1) up to 16/1 year (L6). Rigger 2 p.138.
